title: NanoVDR: Distilling a 2B Vision-Language Retriever into a 70M Text-Only Encoder for Visual Document Retrieval
tldr: Distills a 2B VLM retriever into a 69M text-only encoder that retains 95% quality with 50x lower latency for visual document retrieval.

title: Look in the Middle: Structural Anchor Pruning for Scalable Visual RAG Indexing
tldr: A training-free pruning method that identifies key visual patches from middle layers, achieving over 90% index reduction while maintaining retrieval fidelity.

title: Exploring Human-AI Collaboration in E-Textile Design: A Case Study on Flex Sensor Placement for Shoulder Motion Detection
tldr: Investigates how LLMs can assist human designers in optimizing flex sensor placement on e-textiles for motion capture.

title: Fine-grained Motion Retrieval via Joint-Angle Motion Images and Token-Patch Late Interaction
tldr: An interpretable motion representation using joint-angle pseudo-images with token-wise late interaction for fine-grained text-motion retrieval.

title: LingoMotion: An Interpretable and Unambiguous Symbolic Representation for Human Motion
tldr: A hierarchical motion language inspired by natural language structure for interpretable and unambiguous symbolic motion representation.
